verdict_reason: Prior items 19 and 20 are resolved and the new handleNoResource test is sound, but the new catch-all handleException 500 handler added since the last review has no test coverage anywhere.

todos.issue: New catch-all handleException(Exception.class) handler added to GlobalExceptionHandler since the last review has no test anywhere — handleNoResource got a unit test here and the 415 path is covered via EventsSendControllerTest, but the 500 path (status + error body shape) is unverified
todos.fix: Add handleException_shouldReturn500WithErrorMessage: call handler.handleException(new RuntimeException(...)) and assert INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR plus the {error: "An unexpected error occurred"} body
